exercises.name: Bent-Over Barbell Row
exercises.notes: Hinge to ~45°, bar to lower chest. Retract scapula at top. Keep lower back neutral.

exercises.name: Single Arm DB Row
exercises.notes: Brace against bench, drive elbow to hip. Full stretch at bottom. Per-hand weight.

exercises.name: Underhand Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Shoulder-width underhand grip. Pull to upper chest, hold 1s. Lean back slightly.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.notes: Cross-cable or single pulley. Arms parallel to floor, slight elbow bend. Squeeze rear delts.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curl
exercises.notes: Bench at 45°. Full hang at bottom, supinate at top. Don't swing shoulders. Per-hand weight.
